interrupts.description: Non maskable interrupt. The RCC Clock Security System (CSS) is linked to the NMI vector.
interrupts.name: NMI

interrupts.description: Non-Secure Hard fault. All classes of fault
interrupts.name: Non-secure HardFault

interrupts.description: System service call via SWI instruction
interrupts.name: SVC

interrupts.description: TIM1 Break/TIM1 Transition error/TIM1 Index error
interrupts.name: TIM1_BRK_TERR_IERR

interrupts.description: TIM1 trigger and commutation/TIM1 Direction Change interrupt/TIM1 Index
interrupts.name: TIM1_TRGI_COM_DIR_IDX

interrupts.description: LPUART1 R interrupt OR LPUART1 T interrupt
interrupts.name: LPUART1

interrupts.description: LPTIM1 global interrupt OR LPTimer1 AIT through EXTI line
interrupts.name: LPTIM1

interrupts.description: TIM8 Break/TIM8 Transition error/TIM8 Index error
interrupts.name: TIM8_BRK_TERR_IERR

interrupts.description: TIM8 trigger and commutation/TIM8 Direction Change interrupt/TIM8 Index
interrupts.name: TIM8_TRGI_COM_DIR_IDX

grouping.description: 0 bits for subpriority, 4 bits for pre-emption priority
1 bits for subpriority, 3 bits for pre-emption priority
2 bits for subpriority, 2 bits for pre-emption priority
3 bits for subpriority, 1 bits for pre-emption priority
4 bits for subpriority, 0 bits for pre-emption priority
